title: Agricultural Credits (Appointment of Authorised Agency) Order, 2014

sections.heading: This Order may be cited as the Agricultural Credits (Appointment
ZAMACE Limited is appointed as the authorised agency
sections.text:
for purpose of section six of the Act. Appointment
of authorised
agency
W. SIMUUSA,
LUSAKA Minister of Agriculture
